hypothesis.title: Self-directed fixed-continuation conversation pilot
hypothesis.statement: This pilot records fixed-instruction conversation trajectories across matched entropy conditions.
hypothesis.null_statement: No scientific effect is established by this pilot.
hypothesis.success_criteria: Complete, reconstructable six-turn trajectories under each registered condition.

configuration.note: Operating-system entropy; not a claim of specialised hardware randomness.

prompts.name: initial
prompts.content: Choose any subject you consider worth discussing and begin.

prompts.name: continuation
prompts.content: Continue in whichever direction you choose.

experiment.name: Self-directed conversation pilot
experiment.description: Fixed initial and continuation instructions; prior assistant responses are retained only as assistant chat messages. LM Studio seed support is best-effort.
